item.title: autumn pumpkins
item.description: Check it out on Ko-Fi →. ![[art/autumn pumpkins/images/autumn-pumpkins.jpg]]

item.title: 👑 Catherine the Great - A Tiny Character Study
item.description: I’ve been sick these past few days, so I’ve been watching a lot of “The Great” a quasi-historical comedy-drama based on the rise to power of Catherine the Great, Empress of All Russia.

item.title: 100 days of gouache
item.description: The concept of a 100 days project is you commit to doing something consistently for 100 days straight. For a non sequential 100 days I created a [[notes/gouache|gouache]] painting using 100 Days of Drawing by Jennifer Lewis.
